text.tspan: Replace the Stage / Journey map split with one workspace where path, answer, evidence, and next choices stay visible together.
What do cities choose to forget?
A monument stops behaving like shared memory when its official story
no longer matches lived experience. Conflict is not just about the object;
it is about who is allowed to define the public meaning of a place.
12 sources · 7 cited in the answer · 3 primary records
Both earned paths stay beside the answer.
Return to the outline, compare an earlier
The right rail is about action only — no settings,
long metadata, or duplicate answer content.
MOBILE · SAME INFORMATION, STACKED WITH JUMP LINKS
Conflict is about who is allowed to define
the public meaning of a place.
A · Who gets to rename a public place?
B · Can removal create stronger memory?
Sticky PATH / ANSWER / NEXT links keep the page
orientable without pretending three columns fit on a phone.
THE PRODUCT MODEL BECOMES THE LAYOUT
New turn appears in the outline; context is never lost.
WHY THIS FITS THE CODE THAT EXISTS
• Existing JourneyDetail, turns, parentTurnId, options, and actions
• Exactly two options per ready turn
• Full answer, citations, snapshots, performer, and next-model control
• Library, compare, usage, and settings as global destinations
• Merge Stage and Journey map into one Journey Atlas route
• Make selected turn the single source of context for center + right rails
• Keep the complete outline persistent on desktop and collapsible on tablet
• Use sticky jump links and stacked sections on mobile
Show everything that explains the journey — but give only one thing at a time the strongest visual weight.
